visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A person's hand holds a large pink "Teddy Mini" blind box collection from "LULU THE PIGGY" in front of a shelf. The background is a brightly lit toy store with shelves full of various colorful blind boxes and anime figures. The camera is steady and focuses on the box's artwork showing a pig in a pink bear costume. (2) Two women appear in the frame; the one on the left wears a black ruffed dress with a pearl necklace and a navy beret with a logo. The one on the right wears a black blazer. They stand in a narrow aisle of the toy shop, interacting with the pink box, smiling and talking excitedly toward the lens. (3) The woman in the black blazer reaches into the circular opening of the large pink box to draw a smaller blind pack. The woman in the beret watches with a look of high anticipation. They both exhibit playful facial expressions, and the scene is filled with bright, high-contrast store lighting. (4) They reveal a small, dark grey metallic pig figure held by the woman in the blazer. She brings it close to the camera lens to show the details of the small sculpture. Colorful graphic text overlays and emojis pop up around the figure to emphasize its rare status. (5) The woman in the beret holds up a second figure, a purple pig in a bear suit, while smiling broadly at the camera. She shakes the box playfully. The background remains dense with diverse retail merchandise, maintaining a vibrant and saturated color tone throughout the shot.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 老闆我要豬豬. [Logo]: @HanHan. (2) [Subtitle]: 抽給他. (3) [Subtitle]: 你要什麼豬 大豬小豬?. [Variety]: 大豬小豬?. (4) [Subtitle]: 請給我隱藏版 謝謝你. [Slogan]: 隱藏版. (5) [Subtitle]: 那只好來一個. (6) [Subtitle]: UR隱藏版 不好意思. [Variety]: UR隱藏版. (7) [Subtitle]: 出來吧. [Subtitle]: UR隱藏版. (8) [Subtitle]: 迷霧星辰 也是SR哦. (9) [Subtitle]: 送你一個金屬豬豬. [Variety]: 金屬豬豬. (10) [Subtitle]: 想要隱藏款嗎. (11) [Subtitle]: 噠噠. [Variety]: 噠噠. (12) [Subtitle]: 小隱藏版. [Variety]: 小隱藏版. (13) [Subtitle]: 祝你也中大獎.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators present throughout the video unboxing toys.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair, wearing a navy beret, a black ruffled dress, and a heart choker. The second woman has long dark hair and is wearing a professional black blazer over a casual top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of densely packed retail shelves in a hobby store, filled with various blind boxes, plush toys, and collectible figurines from brands like Pokemon and LULU the Pig.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched female vocals open the track with high arousal, immediately followed by a sharp "pop" sound effect. Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop BGM begins with a driving four-on-the-floor kick drum and bright synth stabs. The mix is clean, indicating a controlled environment. (2) Energetic dialogue between two female voices ensues; the speech is rapid and features high pitch variability to convey excitement. Each vocal phrase is punctuated by "whoosh" transitions and short "ding" sound effects that match the bright frequency of the synthesizer lead in the BGM. (3) A distinct "pop" sound effect marks a transition, followed by sounds of cardboard movement. A classic "ta-da" cartoon sting occurs, emphasizing a reveal. The female voices rise in volume and pitch, showing high positive valence and excitement. BGM remains constant. (4) Multiple layered sound effects, including "sparkle" chimes and digital UI pops, are added to the mix. The voices maintain a high speech rate with very few pauses. The BGM’s low-end remains tight and rhythmic, providing a consistent energy floor for the high-frequency SFX. (5) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic exclamation from the speakers, accompanied by a concluding "ding" and a rapid fade of the BGM. The percussive elements of the music are prominent until the very end, keeping the overall acoustic energy extremely high.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Unboxing Process -> Item Reveal -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and promote the 'LULU THE PIGGY' blind box collection by unboxing rare and 'hidden' figures in an energetic, engaging social media format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video focuses on opening a specific branded blind box product (LULU THE PIGGY) and showing off the results to the audience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced short-form video utilizing typical variety-show editing styles to generate excitement for collectible toys.
